channel.title: Academic on .: Ahmad :.
channel.description: Recent content in Academic on .: Ahmad :.

item.title: Data-driven problems at CoDA 2020!
item.description: Presented on uncertainties in neural networks and had many good discussions around Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) applications.

item.title: I will be attending USC MLUQ workshop and SIGGRAPH 2019, isA
Back to computing research!
item.description: Started a new research adventure at Sandia National Laboratories.

item.title: A new gig: Data Science R&D Manager
item.description: Leading an interdisciplinary IRAD team on data science and behavioral analysis research at Northrop Grumman.
